meta_title: Doctor Website — Personal Specialist Site | Promto
meta_description: Create a personal doctor website in 5 minutes: specialty, experience, online booking, and patient reviews. No code. Attract patients online.
og_description: Personal doctor website with online booking, specialty description, and reviews. Create in 5 minutes, no code, on Promto.
hero_subtitle: A personal website builds your reputation and gives patients a convenient way to book with you.
hero_placeholder: Describe the website for your business...

advantages.title: Doctor Personal Brand
advantages.description: Share your education, experience, certifications, and approach to treatment — stand out from colleagues.

advantages.title: Online Booking With You
advantages.description: Patients book directly with you, bypassing the clinic's general reception.

advantages.title: Patient Reviews
advantages.description: Reviews block builds trust with potential patients and strengthens your reputation.

advantages.title: Quick Launch
advantages.description: Doctor website ready in 5 minutes — describe yourself, AI creates a professional result.

advantages.title: Diplomas and Certificates
advantages.description: Publish qualifications — patients see your professionalism.

advantages.title: Appear in Search
advantages.description: Your name and specialty will be visible in search engines in your city.

how_it_works.title: Tell About Yourself
how_it_works.description: Enter your specialty, experience, and approach — AI will create the biography and site structure.

how_it_works.title: Add Services and Schedule
how_it_works.description: Specify what conditions you treat and when you see patients.

how_it_works.title: Publish and Accept Requests
how_it_works.description: The site works 24/7 and receives inquiries while you care for patients.

faq.question: Is this suitable for a solo private practice doctor?
faq.answer: Yes, this template is designed precisely for this audience. The site configures for private practice.

faq.question: How do I display appointment schedule?
faq.answer: In the editor, add a schedule block specifying days and hours. It's easy to update.

faq.question: Can I accept payments through the website?
faq.answer: Yes, on paid plans, integration with payment systems for consultation fees is available.

faq.question: How do I collect patient reviews?
faq.answer: After the visit, send patients a link to the review form — they publish automatically.

faq.question: How much does a doctor's personal website cost on Promto?
faq.answer: Creation and basic launch are free. Custom domain and advanced features on paid plans.

faq.question: Can I run a blog on my website?
faq.answer: Yes, a blog helps promote expertise and improves SEO. Articles block available in the editor.

cta_mid_subtitle: Patients will find you online and book appointments without calling.
cta_final_subtitle: Create a personal doctor website for free and start attracting patients.
